subject: Gaming
title: Larian Studios and Swen Vincke
description: A micro-lesson that makes Larian Studios and Swen Vincke usable.

hook.text: Swen Vincke spent 25 years making RPGs almost no one played. Then Baldur's Gate 3 won everything.

buildup.text: Larian Studios nearly went bankrupt multiple times. Vincke personally funded development during crises.

discovery.text: Baldur's Gate 3 let players solve every problem in dozens of ways. True freedom in a handcrafted world.

twist.text: The game launched in Early Access and players helped shape it for three years before full release.

climax.text: BG3 won Game of the Year at every major show in 2023. Decades of persistence paid off.

punchline.text: Twenty-five years of near bankruptcy. Then Game of the Year.

quiz.question: How long did Swen Vincke spend making RPGs before his breakout hit?
